summary: The user is a middle school cooking teacher who focuses on teaching students aged 12-16 the basics of healthy and safe cooking. They are interested in using the "Undoing" instructional strategy to help students correct misconceptions about healthy cooking rather than relying on quizzes for memorization.
facts: The user teaches middle school students aged 12-16 the basics of healthy and safe cooking. The user employs the "Undoing" instructional strategy to help learners correct misconceptions before memorization occurs. The user created an undoing activity about healthy sandwich options, comparing white bread and whole wheat bread. The user provided feedback for each potential response in the sandwich activity, explaining misconceptions and correct concepts. The user generated a second undoing activity comparing olive oil and butter for cooking vegetables. The user included a resource link to an article on Healthline about healthy cooking oils.
